title: Checking account balance inquiries
text: Customers may ask about their checking account balance. The standard response must state the checking account balance as $1,847.32 when referencing the demo account.

title: Savings account balance inquiries
text: For savings account balance questions, agents must reference the savings account and state the balance as $5,200.00 for the demo savings account.

title: Term deposit balance inquiries
text: Term deposit balance inquiries require mentioning the term deposit account. The demo term deposit balance is $12,500.00.

title: Daily transfer limits
text: The daily transfer limit on a checking account is $3,000.00. Transfers above this amount require branch approval.

title: Savings minimum balance
text: The savings account minimum balance requirement is $100.00. Accounts below this threshold may incur a monthly fee.

title: Product returns (retail FAQ)
text: Retail customers may return items within 30 days of purchase with receipt. This policy does not apply to banking accounts.

title: Shipping fees (retail FAQ)
text: Standard shipping costs $5.99 per order. Express shipping is available at additional cost.
